Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Screen Shot Movie Theater...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like tickets for today are all sold out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Way of the Godson is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Smile at the Eiffel Tower is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Love, Je t'aime, Saranghaeyo is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The School of No Wonder is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thy Name is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Undersolved Mysteries is now showing.[n]High school students pay 1,500 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We're hiring people who have[n]the guts to talk to anyone. You'll[n]also learn more about movies!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Part-time wage starts at 5,000 yen."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I can work part-time here[n]on days I have off from school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Working here might help improve my[n]{f 4 30 0 1 1 0} and {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a story of a kind-hearted caregiver who[n]married the daughter of a yakuza boss.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a story about a boy with a fear[n]of sharp objects who overcomes his[n]trauma and visits the Eiffel Tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a story about a university[n]student who moves to Tokyo and[n]rooms with three foreign women.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a story about ghosts attacking[n]students at a science-obsessed[n]school to prove their existence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's about a modern teenager and[n]a Heian princess who write each[n]other with time-traveling letters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a popular series that looks[n]into unresolved cases of the past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching this movie might help[n]with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching this movie might improve[n]my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching this movie might help[n]with my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I check...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still watch the movie...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still watch the movie...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still watch the movie...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Screen Shot Movie Theater[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I do here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}See to films and patrons.[n]Raises {f 4 30 2 1 0 0} and[n]{f 4 30 0 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Improves various aspects[n]of a person depending on[n]the movie watched.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} and[n]{f 4 30 2 1 1 0} may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I work part-time here...?[n]{f 1 1}
